content.en:
Ye Tian didn't ask too much.

For example, how many reincarnation celestial clans have nine awakened reincarnation celestial clans, such a question is definitely inconvenient to ask, otherwise if you ask too many questions, there will definitely be problems.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian left this big hall, and he also had a small mansion in the Ancient Mountain of Reincarnation.

Being able to own a mansion in the Ancient Mountain of Reincarnation is not a qualification that ordinary Reincarnation Heavenly Clans have!

It's like the five-time awakening reincarnation celestial clan like Swallowing Xi and Blood Howl, and they are not qualified to have a mansion in the Ancient Mountain of Reincarnation!

Along the way to Ye Tian, the weakest of the reincarnation heavenly clans he saw in the Reincarnation Ancient Mountain were all six-time Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlords, and there were not a few, most of them were Origin Upper Realm Overlords who had awakened seven times or eight times.

And a cultivation like Ao Chen's copy of the body is unique in being able to enter the ancient mountain of reincarnation.

Of course.

The actual combat power of this Ao Chen's copied body was no less than that of the Origin Upper Realm Overlord who had awakened seven times.

It's just that he didn't show it.

......

After this replica body settled in the Ancient Mountain of Reincarnation, he enjoyed a high treatment, and all kinds of resources were supplied to him.

Of course.

Ye Tian is not short of resources now, but he doesn't care too much about these resources.

However, he had gained a lot of inheritances in the Ancient Mountain of Reincarnation, and some of them were also helpful to other races, and they were of great help to the Terrans of the Eternal Land and the Tianshan Pavilion.

More importantly, the Reincarnation Ancient Mountain also collected some Origin Ancestral Body Methods on the other side, and there were a lot of them, but most of them were ordinary Origin Ancestral Body Methods on the other side, and their value was not too high.

But the key is that Ye Tian can take this kind of ancestral body method on the other side, and it can be passed on to the Tianshan Pavilion and the Terran in the future, as the foundation of the Tianshan Pavilion and the Terran Race.

"The Reincarnation Heavenly Clan still has a lot of reincarnation golden inheritance!"

Ye Tian found that those reincarnation golden texts left by the Origin Ancestor could all be found here.

At the beginning, he thought that the reincarnation golden text was created by the original ancestor, but now it seems that he learned it from the reincarnation celestial clan!

"The Origin Ancestor must have been to the Reincarnation Dark Domain!" Ye Tian said darkly.

However, the reincarnation gold text left by the origin ancestor is not complete, and the reincarnation gold text here is the real reincarnation gold text.

Now.

Ye Tian could comprehend the dense reincarnation golden text, which would be helpful to his background and the creation of reincarnation supreme supernatural powers in the future.

"In the coming days, let's understand all these reincarnation golden texts!"

Ye Tian decided.

Time flies.

Ye Tian comprehended one reincarnation after another.

His comprehension is too high, and he also has the resources to improve his comprehension, so it is naturally not difficult to comprehend these reincarnation golden texts.

Gradually, Ye Tian mastered more and more reincarnation golden texts, and it seemed that he could not improve his strength at the moment, but his knowledge and background were rapidly improving.

About thirty million primeval years have passed, and Ye Tian has mastered almost all the reincarnation golden texts here.

Moreover, his Ao Chen's replica body had also reached the limit of three balances in cultivation.

So, he hit the fourth balance here, and there was no difficulty, he easily broke through to the fourth level of balance, and the bloodline of the reincarnation heavenly clan naturally completed the fourth awakening, and his strength skyrocketed.

And his true copy body has not yet reached the fifth equilibrium.

It can be said that Ao Chen's copy body has mastered the supreme divine power of reincarnation, as well as the reincarnation treasure, and his real combat power has surpassed that of the real body copy body.

This is the first time that other replicated bodies have surpassed the real duplicated bodies.

"My Ao Chen's copy body, if I go all out, I can match the weaker Eight Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlords in a short period of time, but I can't fight for a long time!" Ye Tian said darkly.

After all, he can't use the reincarnation supreme supernatural power for a long time now, the reincarnation supreme supernatural power consumes too much power, and once the power is exhausted, he will naturally lose.

But.

Once his True Body Replica Body broke through to the Fifth Balance, his strength could rival that of the True Eight Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlord.

And over the years, he has refined the reincarnation flow marrow and many resources, and Ao Chen's copy body has often transferred resources.

It can be said that the real body replication body is not too far away from the fifth balance.

this day.

Ye Tian's Ao Chen's copy body received a summons from Yazu, and it seemed that he had something important to look for him.

......

Yazu Palace.

Ye Tian came here.

"I've seen Lord Azu!"

Ye Tian said respectfully.

Yazu glanced at Ye Tian and nodded with satisfaction: "Very good, your strength has improved a lot." This time, I have called you because there is an opportunity for you. "

"Serendipity!"

Ye Tian was looking forward to it.

Yazu continued, "This chance has the hope that you will be able to give birth to the second reincarnation supreme supernatural power. "

The second gate of reincarnation is supreme!

Ye Tian was still really interested, if he really obtained the second reincarnation supreme divine power, the strength of his copy body would naturally skyrocket.

"There is a place called the Reincarnation Fruit World in the dark realm of reincarnation, where all kinds of strange reincarnation trees grow, each reincarnation tree is different, and many of them are of high value and grow all kinds of strange fruits. Among them, there is a fruit called the Supreme Fruit of Reincarnation, once eaten, it can make your bloodline undergo a slight change, and you yourself will awaken the supreme power of reincarnation, if you eat it, there is a one-third chance that the second reincarnation supreme divine power will be born. Even if you can't awaken the second reincarnation supreme supernatural power, your cultivation will skyrocket!"

"However, there are some dangers in the Reincarnation Fruit Realm, and our Reincarnation Celestial Clan is not completely in control, and there is also a force that will also enter the Reincarnation Fruit Realm, and it is somewhat dangerous to enter the Reincarnation Fruit Realm. Yazu said.

"Lord Yazu, there are still forces that can compete with our reincarnation celestial clan???"

Ye Tian showed a puzzled look.

In fact, he also guessed that there was a force that could be no less than the reincarnation celestial clan, but he had never had a chance to understand, this time it was a chance!

Yazu hurriedly said: "Outside the reincarnation dark domain, there is also an area - the reincarnation source domain, where a reincarnation source clan is born!"

As he spoke, Yazu waved his hand, and a phantom of the reincarnation origin clan emerged.

The reincarnation of the Celestial Clan is black, while the Reincarnation Source Clan is white, and judging from the phantom, a strong aura of origin emerges from the Reincarnation Origin Clan.

I saw Yazu continue: "The path of the reincarnation origin clan is different from that of the reincarnation heavenly clan, we are bloodline awakening, and they are breaking the boundary of the origin of reincarnation, their physical body is not good, but the origin of reincarnation is very powerful, and they are good at all kinds of weird techniques, so we must be very careful when encountering them." "
